title: alnus sitchensis
intro: Alnus sitchensis, also known as the Sitka alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The medicinal properties of Alnus sitchensis include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include reducing fever, relieving sore throats, and supporting the immune system. Alnus sitchensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its bark and leaves can be used in various herbal preparations to promote overall well-being.
